name: Stifel Financial Corp.
description: Stifel Financial Corp. is a diversified global wealth management and investment banking company headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri. Founded in 1890, the firm provides a comprehensive range of financial services, including securities brokerage, investment banking, trading, investment advisory, and related financial services to individuals, families, and institutions. With a long-standing history of over 135 years, Stifel is committed to building enduring relationships and helping clients pursue their financial goals through expert research, personalized market insights, and a dedicated team of professionals focused on delivering sound financial guidance across various market cycles.
